overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a shallow stream surrounded by lush summer vegetation. The camera moves steadily through the water, transitioning from a narrow enclosed section with dense bushes to a more open area with a grassy hillside, eventually approaching a fallen tree obstacle.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow stream through dense vegetation corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through shallow stream water surrounded by dense vegetation on both sides

entered.detail: shallow flowing water covering the ground path
tall green reeds with seed heads lining the left bank
thick green bushes and shrubs on the right bank
smooth stones visible beneath the water surface

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a narrow stream corridor enclosed by dense vegetation. Tall reeds and bushes line both sides of the shallow water, creating a tunnel-like effect with limited sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: stream with open grassy hillside on left bank

events.description: left bank opens up from dense bushes to grassy hillside with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: continuing through the stream as the left side opens to a grassy slope

entered.detail: sloped grassy embankment replacing the dense bushes on the left
individual trees growing on the hillside in the distance

segments.scene_description: The stream environment opens up as the left bank transitions from dense vegetation to a grassy hillside with scattered trees. The right bank remains bushy while the walking path continues through the shallow water.

events.description: fallen tree trunk becomes visible across the stream ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching a fallen tree trunk that blocks the stream path ahead

entered.detail: large fallen tree trunk lying across the stream blocking the path
broad-leafed vegetation on the right bank
old stone wall or structure visible on the hillside in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach toward a fallen tree trunk blocking the stream path. The grassy hillside continues on the left with a distant stone wall visible, while large leafy plants line the right bank.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a shallow stream that transforms from a claustrophobic green corridor into an open riverside landscape. It begins by moving through a narrow waterway enclosed by tall reeds and dense bushes that create a tunnel-like effect with limited visibility of the sky. As the camera advances, the environment opens up when the left bank shifts from thick vegetation to a wide, grassy hillside dotted with scattered trees. The scene then expands further, revealing a distant stone wall along the hillside while large leafy plants line the right bank. Finally, the forward motion leads the camera directly toward a fallen tree trunk that blocks the path of the stream.
